title: Capability v1
description: An organizational qualification statement: the organization can perform this class of work under these conditions using any currently qualified resource. A Capability is the OUTPUT SCHEMA of the association engine — derived, never authored. There is no write path for confidence or qualification_status; both are computed from evidence on every projection, so the record cannot rot the way a hand-maintained skill matrix does. Constitutional rule: no organizational truth may be authored if it can be derived.

capability_id.description: Deterministic identity derived from the invariant, so re-projection updates the capability in place.

statement.description: The qualification, stated for a human operator.

invariant.description: The conditions the capability holds under — inherited from the association that produced it. Must include task_kind: a capability is about a class of work.

derived_from_association.description: The association_id this capability was projected from — provenance up the spine.

confidence.description: COMPUTED from distinct-workflow count. Any hand-writable confidence field rebuilds the rotten skill matrix.

qualified_resources.description: The resource combinations whose observed successes support the capability. The scheduler asks which capabilities a mission requires, then which of these satisfies them — qualified capabilities are scheduled, not machines.

max_context_tokens.description: Largest context actually observed succeeding. The envelope is what was measured, not what is hoped.

requires_gpu.description: true/false only when every supporting observation agrees; null when mixed or unknown.

failure_modes.description: Failure classes ever observed on the qualified resources — the known edges of the envelope.

last_validated.description: Timestamp of the newest supporting observation. Qualification decays from here.

evidence_watermark.description: The newest timestamp anywhere in the corpus — 'now' as the organization knows it. Staleness is measured against this, never against wall clock, so re-projection of the same corpus is byte-identical.

qualification_status.description: COMPUTED: qualified while staleness_days <= the qualification window, requalification_due after. A due capability is experiment demand — preventative maintenance, not emergency repair.
